---
title: "The Rev. Lonsdale Pritt"
---

## The Rev. Lonsdale Pritt

**Dates:** (1821/2-1885)

### Description

missionary in Melanesia

### Biography

He subsequently worked as a clergyman in New Zealand and became Archdeacon of Waikato.  See www.anglicanhistory.org/nz/blain_directory/directory.pdf

### Letters

- Letter from Aug. 6, 1863.
- Letter from May 6, 1862.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
